pet.name: Hazel
pet.breedColor: brown tabby gone grizzled and silver around the muzzle, with a white chest and chin and pale green eyes

memories.ageOrStage: sixteen now, slower but still the boss of the house
memories.quirks: the way you knead the blanket three times before you finally settle
memories.stillLoves: still climbs into the window box every morning to watch the birds
memories.favoriteActivity: the slow patrol of the garden fence we still take at dusk
memories.favoriteRitual: the saucer of warm milk I set down while the kettle boils
memories.sleepingSpot: the folded quilt on the radiator shelf
memories.favoriteSpots: the sunny sill above the kitchen sink, where the afternoon light lands
memories.ownerMessage: Thank you for sixteen years of quiet company.
